entities.name: Port of Doha ↔ Katara Cultural Village
entities.meta_description: The EHang EH216-S completed first urban human-carrying pilotless eVTOL flights in the Middle East between Port of Doha and Katara Cultural Village on 17 November 2025. 8-minute flight vs ~30 minutes by car.
